name: @ajh/scraper-runtime
description: AI Job Hunter scraper sidecar — HTTP runtime process for Tauri and future web backends

scripts.build:binary: pnpm build && ncc build dist/index.js -o dist/bundle --no-source-map-register -q && pkg dist/bundle/index.js --no-bytecode --public-packages "*" --public -t node20 -o ../../apps/tauri/src-tauri/binaries/scraper-runtime
